title: Introducing Soundwave: Discover Your Sound
excerpt: We built Soundwave to help you discover music that moves you. Here’s why we’re excited.
author: Team Soundwave
content:
Welcome to Soundwave — your personal music discovery companion. We believe music should be effortless and delightful. Our mission is to help you find songs that fit every mood.

What we built

Personalized recommendations, curated playlists, and a lightweight player — all in a beautiful interface.

Join us

We’re just getting started. Follow along for updates and behind-the-scenes posts.

title: How We Recommend Music
excerpt: A peek under the hood at our recommendation strategy.
author: Data Team
content:
Recommendations combine listening patterns, moods, and editorial curation. We use lightweight heuristics optimized for speed.

Mood signals

We analyze tempo, energy, and listener context to map songs to moods.

title: Top 10 Indie Albums of 2024
excerpt: A countdown of the most unforgettable indie releases this year.
author: Mia Harper
content:
From bedroom producers to breakthrough bands, these indie albums are defining the sound of 2024.

Why they matter

These records blend intimate songwriting with powerful production and unforgettable hooks.

title: Behind the Beat: How Lo-Fi Became a Movement
excerpt: Tracing the chill wave that turned study playlists into a cultural phenomenon.
author: Lena Cruz
content:
Lo-fi has become more than a playlist genre — it’s a global vibe that blends nostalgia, warmth, and modern production.

From YouTube streams to bedroom studios

Learn how a generation turned simple loops into a cultural movement.

title: My Experience at Coachella 2024
excerpt: A firsthand festival recap with the best sets, surprises, and summer-ready energy.
author: Jade Nguyen
content:
Between sunrise sets and late-night surprises, Coachella 2024 delivered unforgettable performances and must-see moments.

The highlights

From dance anthems to intimate acoustic showcases, here’s the full festival experience.

title: Why Jazz Never Gets Old
excerpt: A tribute to the restless spirit of jazz and why it still inspires every generation.
author: Noah Ellis
content:
Jazz is one of those rare forms that can feel both historic and brand-new, depending on who listens.

From improvisation to innovation

How jazz keeps evolving and inspiring modern artists across genres.

title: EDM Production 101: Where to Start
excerpt: A beginner’s guide to producing electronic music, from first beat to full track.
author: Kai Morgan
content:
If you’re ready to build your first beat, here’s what you need to know about workflow, sound design, and structure.

Starting with the fundamentals

Learn the gear, tools, and mindset behind strong electronic productions.

title: Artist Spotlight: Billie Eilish's Evolution
excerpt: A look at Billie Eilish’s sound, image, and what comes next.
author: Riley Park
content:
Billie Eilish continues to reinvent herself with each release. Here’s what her latest era says about the future of pop.

The creative shift

Exploring how songwriting, production, and visuals come together in her latest work.
